benefits.description: Lost 91 lbs in 18 weeks on tirzepatide (from 397 to 306 lbs). Total weight loss from starting weight of 553 lbs to current 307 lbs represents 246 lbs total reduction.
Medication enables user to resist hunger and food cravings, making calorie deficit maintainable.
BPC-157/TB-500 blend used for recovery from ruptured bicep tendon.

protocol_notes: Started tirzepatide December 2023 (18 weeks total as of post date April 2024). Initially attempted weight loss through diet and exercise alone from 2022 (lost 196 lbs from 556 to 360, then regained 30 lbs). Considered semaglutide but chose tirzepatide (brand Mounjaro) as newer option. After initial 16-week program ended, sourced tirzepatide directly from biotech company. Height: 6'3". Previously used BPC-157/TB-500 blend from same biotech vendor for bicep tendon rupture recovery.
